title: Crabby Krabby (Cobblemon)
description: This resource pack remodels and retextures krabby from mod Cobblemon and so it will look like crab from Minecraft Live 2023. Because a lot of people were upset with crab losing I decided to add it  combined with pokemons and so it changed krabby.
body: Changes model and texture of krabby so it will look like crab from Minecraft Live 2023. So those of you who were upset with crab's lose will fell better with having crab at least in cobblemon with my resource pack.
